title: GADLANE Car 2 In 1 Plastic Funnel With Extendable Flexible Spout - Set of 2 Funnels for Petrol, Diesel, Screen Wash, Adblue, Add Blue, Water, Oil, Fuel, Coolant (PACK OF 2)
features: 2 Pack premium quality funnels with flexible detachable extension.
Easy to use, with wide 15cm diameter funnel head and 19cm long funnel - up to 37cm when fully extended.
Made from the highest quality PVC plastic. Comes with a built-in mesh gauze filter to make sure the fuel entering your vehicle is debris free.
Safe to use with water, screen wash, fuel, gas, kerosene, petroleum, gasoline, engine oil and coolant.
Wide neck offers rapid filling with no mess. The anti-splash and non-spill design makes this universal funnel an essential addition to your car kit.
description: Product Description Detachable Extension Pack of 2 Funnels Wide Neck, Anti-Splash Design GADLANE 2 In 1 Flexible Funnel (Pack Of 2) Set of 2 premium quality plastic funnels with flexible and detachable extension nozzle. 15cm diameter funnel head, 19cm length, 37cm full length including extension. Made from the highest quality PVC plastic. Comes with a built-in mesh gauze filter. Safe to use with water, screen wash, fuel, gas, kerosene, petroleum, gasoline, engine oil, and coolant. Universal funnel with a non-spill, anti-splash design, plus a wide neck to offer rapid filling and no mess. Funnel Entrance Diameter: 15cm Funnel Length: 19cm (37cm when fully extended) GADLANE Concentrated Windscreen Washer Fluid GADLANE 5L 5w30 Engine Oil GADLANE 3 Meters Heavy Duty Jump Leads GADLANE Deionised Water Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 49 4.7 out of 5 stars 176 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,223 4.6 out of 5 stars 475 Price — no data — no data £14.99 £ 14 . 99 — no data Description GADLANE Concentrated Car Screen Wash 5L helps prevent dangerous sun dazzle on the windshield to keep you safe while driving all year round. GADLANE 5w/30 fully-synthetic, Petrol/diesel SN/CF Engine Oil provides excellent protection for modern engines that require a low viscosity 5w-30 fully synthetic engine oil. Colour-coded, heavy-duty booster cables for your convenience and security, presented in a handy storage bag. GADLANE De-ionised water extends the lifespan in engine batteries. Suitable for car batteries and radiators.
